title.en: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner

summary.en: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.

title.en: Keep calm and carry on - Spain trust team identity to deliver World Cup

title.en: Tuchel did not deliver, but his time with England is not up - Shearer
title.zh-CN: Tuchel没有交付，但他在英格兰的时间还没有结束- Shearer

title.en: Effort, spirit and moments - but do England lack all-round quality?

title.en: Pele at the Azteca? England in '66? Ranking the best World Cup finals

title.en: Underdogs, history and late goals - Africa's World Cup
title.zh-CN: 失败者、历史和后期目标-非洲世界杯

summary.en: The 2026 World Cup saw Africa send its largest ever contingent to the finals, but five sides were eliminated by late goals as underdogs Cape Verde impressed.
summary.zh-CN: 在2026年世界杯上，非洲派出了有史以来规模最大的队伍进入决赛，但佛得角的劣势球员给人留下了深刻的印象，五支球队被后期的进球淘汰出局。
